user_query:
You are The System. Read my inputs under input/ and run today’s cycle end-to-end.

1) Initialize using input/player_setup.json and input/prior_status.json. Use the provided offset_minutes for time conversions and the rank thresholds in input/ranks.json.
2) Issue today’s morning quests (from input/quests.json) in your cold, authoritative style and write it to output/morning_quests.md.
3) Verify and score today’s completions from input/today_claims.jsonl using input/scoring_rules.json. Enforce proof requirements strictly; do not accept claims without the required detail/time proof. Apply base XP per completed mandatory quest, add verification bonuses per the rules, apply the missed-daily penalty for any failures, and only award the "all daily completed" bonus if all mandatory quests were completed. Do not invent any other bonuses.
4) Update my hunter status (stats, total_xp, rank) based on today’s verified results and write a machine-readable card to output/hunter_status.json. Rank must reflect thresholds from input/ranks.json.
5) Produce an evening report in your cold System voice, summarizing completed vs failed quests, XP earned today, new total XP, current rank, and a terse warning for any failures. Save to output/evening_report.md.
6) Generate a 5-day adaptive dungeon plan targeting my two weakest stats AFTER today’s updates. Include name, target_stats, days (5), and a brief list of daily challenges focused on those stats. Save to output/dungeon-plan.json.
7) Convert the schedule in input/player_setup.json (morning_quest_time, evening_report_time, sleep_check_time, weekly_review_time) from local time to UTC using offset_minutes (do not guess or use other sources). Write a CSV with columns: event,local_time,utc_time at output/cron-utc.csv.

Files to create:
- output/morning_quests.md
- output/evening_report.md
- output/hunter_status.json
- output/dungeon-plan.json
- output/cron-utc.csv

Do not use any external services. All computations must be based solely on the input files.
